arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen boss Xabi Alonso knows the challenge Bayern Munich will present
arts.sum: Going to the Allianz Arena is probably the toughest game of the Bundesliga season. After dethroning his former club last season in the Bundesliga, Alonso knows Saturday’s tilt is one of the most anticipated battles for his team during the 2024/25 campaign.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs Bayer Leverkusen: Lineups, team news, is Vincent Kompany really a match for Xabi Alonso, injuries, and more!
arts.sum: We already covered WHY his new-look Bayern is different from the one coached by Tuchel on our recent podcast (which you can listen to below or on Spotify ), but all that won’t mean much if it ends in another loss regardless. Now, Vincent Kompany has a chance to make things right, and show the world that Bayern Munich mean business this season.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich boss Vincent Kompany can feel excitement for Bayer Leverkusen showdown
arts.sum: Bayern Munich manager Vincent Kompany will oversee his squad’s first major test of the season when the Bavarians square off with Bayer Leverkusen on Saturday. “I’ve already said before that when I played against the best Bayern teams in the past, we had good players, but we still didn’t have the feeling we could have the ball.

arts.ttl: The dominance of Bayern Munich youngster Aleksandar Pavlović
arts.sum: But Pavlović, a defensive midfielder by trade, was always working hard away from the spotlight, just until the spotlight — and team needs — found him. One summer ago, Aleksandar Pavlović was probably not the first or second Bayern Munich campus product to even come to mind for followers of the team.

arts.ttl: Weekend Warm-up: Should Bayern Munich embrace a plan for Project 2026?; Bundesliga and Champions League predictions; Throwing it back to Nine Inch Nails; and MORE!
arts.sum: Should Bayern Munich look to hold on to him to play out his deal — or should the Bavarians let him waltz back to England a year early and turn its attention to acquiring a younger striker to team with Wirtz and Musiala (if Bayern Munich lands the Bayer Leverkusen star in 2025)? Bayern Munich has a massive game ahead with Bayer Leverkusen, but there is so much going on with this squad that we have plenty to discuss.

arts.ttl: Victor Boniface: "I don't really like the Premier League"
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen forward Victor Boniface has made it clear that he's not particularly attracted to a move to England, saying he "doesn't really like the Premier League".
